---
image: img.jpg
title: Dynamic analysis of automatic emotion recognition using generalized additive
  mixed models
author: Damien Dupré, Adam Booth, Andrew Bolster, Gawain Morrison, and Gary J McKeown
description: Annual Convention of the Society for the Study of Artificial Intelligence
  and Simulation for Behaviour (AISB 2017)
date: '2017-04-01'
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
---

::: {#hero-heading}

Annual Convention of the Society for the Study of Artificial Intelligence and Simulation for Behaviour (AISB 2017)

:::
